creator: maho@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note: This is a follow up problem report of ports/164230: repocopy request: editors/openoffice.org-3-devel to editors/apache-openoffice-3-devel.

Please repocopy to 
editors/openoffice.org-3-devel to editors/openoffice-3-devel
and remove editors/apache-openoffice-3-devel

Some details:
The Apache Foundation take over the development from OpenOffice.org
community and Oracle. Now this project is accepted
as "incubator" project. Moreover, Oracle has stopped development. Then
The name of the product has also been changed to Apache OpenOffice.
https://cwiki.apache.org/confluence/display/OOOUSERS/Branding+Planning

Notably ".org" has been omitted democratically and also, "Apache" is the part
of the name of the product, which should not be removed.

After I submitted ports/164230 and processed, discussions happened at ports-developers@freebsd.org. The prefix "apache" is not suitable for us.
Still I can add it in the PKGNAME.

Thanks
 Nakata Maho

Fix: 

repocopy to 
editors/openoffice.org-3-devel to editors/openoffice-3-devel
and remove editors/apache-openoffice-3-devel
